channel.title: Onprem_deployments on DefectDojo Documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Onprem_deployments on DefectDojo Documentation

item.title: Running DefectDojo Behind a Forward HTTPS Proxy
item.description: If your DefectDojo Pro on-prem deployment cannot make direct outbound connections to the internet — for example, because firewall rules require all egress to go through a forward HTTPS proxy — you can configure the standard HTTPS_PROXY, HTTP_PROXY, and NO_PROXY environment variables. DefectDojo will route its outbound calls through the proxy accordingly.
